app.name: Street Fighter 3
app.author: Libretro Team & R-Sam
app.long_description:
Street Fighter III - New Generation - Developer & Publisher : Capcom - Genre : Fight / Versus - Release Date : 1997/02/04 - Max Players : 2
Wii Channel : usb:/wad/Street Fighter 3 Website : https://github.com/R-Sam-1980/cps3

arguments.arg: usb:/Games/Arcade (FB Alpha 2012 CPS-3)/Street Fighter III - New Generation
